af.name: af_core8
af.description: Default TS-SatFire AF/BA input stack with the current 8 channels.
af.research_motivation: Strong default baseline for AF/BA experiments and current production path.

af.name: af_day_only
af.description: Ablation that keeps only daytime VIIRS-style inputs.
af.research_motivation: Tests whether nighttime signals are materially improving progression mapping.

af.name: af_night_heavy
af.research_motivation: Tests whether nocturnal thermal activity is carrying more signal than daytime reflectance.

pred.name: pred_full43
pred.description: Full prediction stack currently used by the pred path.
pred.research_motivation: Reference prediction configuration with the richest feature space.

pred.name: pred_no_landcover
pred.description: Removes land-cover one-hot channels while keeping the temporal remote-sensing stack.
pred.research_motivation: Tests whether static land-cover encoding is contributing real predictive value.

pred.name: pred_no_firepred
pred.description: Removes engineered FirePred inputs while retaining remote-sensing channels.
pred.research_motivation: Measures dependence on external progression priors.

pred.name: pred_remote_only
pred.description: Keeps only direct remote-sensing channels and excludes static and engineered auxiliaries.
pred.research_motivation: Provides a lean remote-sensing-only baseline for ablation and interpretability.
